awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.

nodes.itemHTML: • Portable ASCIIstars353 - A library to convert strings to ascii.
